/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Werror -g -rdynamic "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_hello.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_assignment_validate.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/__/student-test/assignment1/Test_validate_username.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_hello_Runner.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_assignment_validate_Runner.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/__/student-test/assignment1/Test_validate_username_Runner.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/__/examples/autotest-validate/autotest-validate.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/unity_runner.o" -o assignment-autotest  Unity/src/libunity.a
